title: nf-core/hnenucseg pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

slide_path.errorMessage: slide_path must be provided and cannot contain spaces. Accepts any WSI format readable by pyvips/OpenSlide (e.g. .svs, .tif, .tiff, .ndpi, .mrxs).
